Title: Prohibits certain financial institutions from charging a fee based on the frequency of payments or for changing the frequency of mortgage payments
Summary: Prohibits certain financial institutions from charging a fee for making monthly, semi-monthly, and biweekly payments or for changing the frequency of mortgage payments.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the banking law, in relation to prohibiting certain financial institutions from charging fees based on the frequency of mortgage payments or changing such payment schedule
